body_txt: Two unwed partners end up with a bastard child for one reason or another. It could be because of a One-Night-Stand Pregnancy , Friends with Benefits , a But We Used a Condom! situation, or just plain Miss Conception . Then, at some point after the child is born, the parents end up getting married. This could occur as opposed to a Shotgun Wedding (which occurs after conception but before the birth) for various reasons. One of the more obvious cases is where a Teen Pregnancy is at play, and the parents were afraid of getting married at a younger age. Additionally, the marriage could have been caused by the child itself. Maybe they were just either too busy dealing with the pregnancy to deal with marriage too or in a Common Law Marriage , or the father only recently learned he had a kid . In some cases, the parents end up getting divorced anyway, due to either Status Quo Is God , a realization that they aren't compatible, or both. Often Truth in Television . In some law systems (like that of Scotland before the Marriage Reform Act), if a child was born to parents who were free to marry at the time of birth and they married at any point afterwards, the child became a legitimate heir. See also Honorable Marriage Proposal , which is done to save the woman's reputation. Could overlap with Platonic Co-Parenting , Staying Together for the Kids , and The Baby Trap . Some relation to a Shipper with an Agenda -type Kid from the Future . This trope may occur along with Biological Parent Reunion . In cases where the marriage backfires horribly , see Awful Wedded Life . In cases where it doesn't, see Happily Married or Earn Your Happy Ending instead. Has nothing to do with child marriage nor waiting for a child to be old enough to get married. For tropes about that, see Married Too Young , The Jailbait Wait , and Wife Husbandry . Also not about anyone marrying someone who already has a child, if that child isn't theirs. That's Parent with New Paramour .
